'''Oodonnaa''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Information broker/Legends|information broker]] on [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]]. On his first visit to Nar Shaddaa, she provided [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] with directions toward the [[Corellian Sector (Nar Shaddaa)/Legends|Corellian sector]] of the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] and instructions on how to contact [[Mako Spince]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The Hutt Gambit]]'' {{1st}}
